title: Polygon's Origins and Major Announcements: Revolut and Mastercard | Money Rails 2025 | Polygon Labs
description:
Co-founder and CEO of Polygon Foundation Sandeep Nailwal is joined by Polygon Labs CEO John Egan to talk about the origins of Polygon, the growing onchain payments landscape, and major announcements with Revolut and Mastercard.

#polygon
